scenario: Coupon code length must be 6 to 10 characters inclusive.
Applicant type can be employee, contractor, or guest. Guests are rejected. Employees and contractors may continue.
A transfer is allowed only when the source account is active, the destination account is active, and the amount is below the risk threshold.
Search results depend on browser, locale, sort order, and membership tier; exhaustive coverage is too large.
An order can move from Draft to Submitted to Paid to Shipped, and cancellation is legal only before shipment.
Given a registered shopper, when they apply a valid gift card during checkout, then the order total is reduced and the remaining balance is shown.
